svg.title: The naive RAG approach: sending the whole PDF text in one request, which overflows the model MTU
svg.desc: The entire text of a large PDF is placed into the request frame as one giant context block. The frame is far larger than the model MTU, so the data center rejects it with an HTTP 400 context length exceeded error.
svg.text: 1. The naive way — put the WHOLE PDF in the request
2. The frame is enormous — and the MTU does NOT stretch
Whole PDF text as context — ~320,000 tokens
this single block is bigger than the entire model MTU
payload — every page counts as tokens
we need to send only the
